title: Senior Technical Architect
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.

Job Summary

The Senior Technical Architect leads the design and delivery of end-to-end architectures, driving digital transformation initiatives and ensuring successful outcomes for banking and insurance clients.

Responsibilities

  • Lead enterprise, solution, and application architecture to deliver scalable and effective technology solutions aligned with business goals
  • Architect cloud-native, API-driven, microservices-based solutions to enable agile and modular system designs
  • Drive architecture governance by establishing reusable assets and standards to ensure consistency and quality across projects
  • Lead solution design and technical proposals for RFPs and large-scale transformation deals to support business growth
  • Act as a trusted advisor to CIOs and CTOs by shaping transformation programs across channels, payments, and cloud environments
  • Present architectural vision and recommendations to senior stakeholders to influence strategic decision-making
  • Collaborate with Sales teams to define innovative solutions and delivery models that meet client needs
  • Provide architectural guidance throughout delivery phases to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and performance standards
  • Serve as the final escalation point for complex technical decisions to mitigate risks and resolve challenges
  • Drive engineering excellence by promoting DevOps, Site Reliability Engineering (SRE), Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD), and automation practices
  • Champion innovation initiatives including AI integration and cloud modernization to enhance technology capabilities
  • Lead the development of real-time data platforms and API ecosystems to support dynamic business operations
  • Conduct architecture assessments and modernization planning to continuously improve technology landscapes
  • Mentor architects and engineers to build technical capabilities and foster professional growth
  • Support hiring and upskilling efforts to strengthen the architecture practice across Southeast Asia
  • Develop reusable accelerators and standards to improve efficiency and quality in architecture delivery
  • Contribute to architecture governance frameworks to maintain alignment with organizational objectives
  • Shape deal constructs and solution estimates to support financial and commercial accountability
  • Support margin protection and participate in account planning and solution qualification to drive business success

Required competencies and certifications

  • Deep expertise in financial services industry (FSI) architecture to address sector-specific challenges
  • Proven experience designing and implementing cloud, microservices, API, and data engineering solutions
  • Strong communication skills with C-level executives to effectively convey architectural strategies and influence outcomes
  • Minimum 15 years of technology experience with demonstrated leadership in architecture roles
